welcome_description:
This is a Digital Publishing Marketplace.
Authors can submit content and users can purchase.

🔐 Security and trust are our priority!

browse.title: 📚 Available Content:
browse.empty:
📭 No content available at the moment.
Coming soon!

purchase.success:
✅ Purchase successful!

📖 {title}
💰 {price} Birr

This content has been added to your library.

author.welcome:
✍️ Welcome author!

You can now upload content.

Use /upload to upload content.

📌 Note:
• PDF files only
• Copyright must be declared
• Price must be approved by admin
author.not_author:
❌ You are not an author!
First use /become_author.

upload.instruction:
📤 Upload Content

Send the following information in order:

1️⃣ Title
2️⃣ Description
3️⃣ Category (ebook, magazine, handout, question_bank, research_paper)
4️⃣ Price (in Birr)
5️⃣ PDF File
upload.title_prompt:
✅ Title received!
Now send the description.
upload.price_prompt:
✅ Price received!
Now send the PDF file.
upload.invalid_file:
❌ Unsupported file format!
Please send a PDF.
upload.file_prompt:
❌ Please send a PDF file!
Send the file as a document.
upload.success:
✅ Content uploaded successfully!

📖 {title}
💰 {price} Birr

It will be published after admin approval.

library.title: 📖 *My Library*
library.empty:
📭 Your library is empty.
Buy content to fill it!

admin.welcome:
👋 Welcome Admin {name}!

📊 You are in the Admin Bot.
{status}
Use the options below.
admin.broadcast:
📢 *Send Broadcast*

Type the message you want to send.

errors.admin_only: ⛔ You must be an admin to use this command!

system.status:
⚙️ *System Status*

📊 *Database*
• Size: {size} MB
• Status: ✅ Active

🤖 *Bots*

• Admin Bot: ✅ Active

• System: ✅ Healthy
